bucket_rationale: Outlier via >250 lines per the bucket rubric (485 lines). CLAUDE.md emphasizes session-start protocols referencing .claude/*.md protocol docs (BACKPORT.md, ESSENTIAL_PROTOCOLS.md, etc. at .claude/ root — rules_count=0 under strict .claude/rules/ subdir convention). T2/T3 mostly weak due to protocol-heavy + project-overview-light content. LAV: L5=-3 (protocol bloat), L3=+3 (extensive protocols). Protocol structure is unconventional (rubric-footnote n/a impact).
